summary.key_theme: 儘管 Figma 在 AI 領域投入顯著且營收成長達 40 %，但高達 9.46 倍的股價營收比 (P/S ratio) 與市場競爭壓力，加上監管審查與內部人拋售疑慮，導致市場情緒轉趨保守。

bullish.title: Figma's Push Into AI Is Great, But Not Great Enough To Buy — Figma (FIG) Q4 2025 update: 40% revenue growth and paid-subscriber gains with significant investments in AI.
bullish.reason: 公司公布 2025 年第 4 季財報，營收成長達 40 % 且付費訂閱用戶增加，顯示其 AI 產品策略具備市場吸引力，為股價提供基本面支撐。

bullish.title: Insiders Step in to Buy These 3 Tanking Stocks — See why insider buying at KKR, Figma, and Reddit is drawing attention after steep selloffs.
bullish.reason: 內部人於股價重挫後進場買入，通常被視為管理層對公司長期價值具備信心的訊號，有助於緩解市場恐慌情緒。

bearish.title: Should Investors Hold or Fold Figma Stock at a P/S Multiple of 9.46X? — FIG stock trades at a steep 9.46x sales multiple as margins shrink, growth slows, and AI competition from Adobe, Microsoft.
bearish.reason: 高達 9.46 倍的 P/S 倍數在獲利能力萎縮與成長放緩的背景下顯得過高，且面臨 Adobe 與 Microsoft 等巨頭的 AI 競爭，估值修正風險極大。

bearish.title: Figma Faces Securities Review And Insider Sales Raise Governance Questions
bearish.reason: 面臨證券審查與內部人拋售股票的雙重打擊，引發市場對公司治理結構與合規性的嚴重質疑，對股價構成顯著負面壓力。

bearish.title: Weak Overall Sentiment on Figma, Inc. (FIG) Amid Weak Industry Momentum
bearish.reason: 整體產業動能疲軟，加上 Figma 股價持續下跌，反映出市場對該公司短期表現缺乏信心，技術面與籌碼面均呈現弱勢。
